name: Priya Raman
description: A woman in a dust-greyed blazer feeding banknotes into a cold stove one at a time, counting them out of habit as they curl and catch.
background: Managed the Union Bank branch and stayed to guard a vault of money that will never be spent again.
personality: Precise, composed, and sparing with her words — she counts before she trusts.
secret: She forced the safe-deposit boxes open weeks ago and knows exactly what her neighbours were hiding.
notes: T45 · Downtown. Skill: logistics/organization. Hook: the boxes hold leverage, heirlooms, and one thing someone will kill to recover.
